response.justification: Bogdan has over 20 years of robust software engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background, easily meeting the minimum requirements for the role. However, while he has recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud tools, his profile aligns more with a hands-on Staff Engineer than a Director-level AI strategist with recognized industry expertise in AI platform development and enterprise advisory.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum 15 years of software engineering experience with a diverse technical background.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the founder of GISCollective, fulfilling a preferred qualification.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and utilizing cloud technologies.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
Experience is heavily weighted toward tactical software development rather than Director-level strategic AI vision.
Missing clear evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or having deeply recognized industry expertise in AI.
